channel.title: Rust on LucianDavies
channel.description: Recent content in Rust on LucianDavies

item.title: Bootstrapping a rust project with cargo generate command
item.description: Intro Many times as with the case with trying to learn something new you find small obstacles that slow down your progress and before you know it you have abandoned your shiny new adventure. This is a common problem in software development that we have CLI’s and generators design to catapult you into the exciting bits. As much as there is a need to learn the basic process of building your project sometimes you want to just try something and see if its worth chasing.
